analysis.reasoning: Core message: Pompeo calls for transatlantic cooperation to confront the "China challenge" to protect free societies, prosperity, and the future. Evaluation: US1 (honorable tradition) – Not explicitly referencing American historical legacy or feats; no. US2 (admirable society) – No mention of social groups, civil society, companies, or heroes; no. US3 (hostile enemies) – Yes: frames China as a challenge threatening liberal values and prosperity, positioning it as an adversary to be countered. US4 (force for good) – Implicitly about defending freedom, but the tweet focuses on confronting China rather than showcasing US support for human rights or aid; weak link, so no. US5 (great international ally) – Yes: urges working together across the Atlantic, implying alliance leadership and solidarity with allies. US6 (at the forefront) – Does not claim US leadership or superiority; no. Conclusion: US3 and US5 apply.
